name: Jamaican Curried Chicken
recipeIngredient: 1 inch piece ginger, peeled and finely chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat vegetable oil in a stew pot over medium heat.
2. Add garlic, scallions, pepper, curry powder, allspice, and ginger. Cook until fragrant, about 3-4 minutes.
3. Add the cut-up chicken to the pot and simmer, covered, on low heat for approximately 10 minutes or until cooked through.
4. Stir in coconut milk and potatoes. Continue cooking for an additional 30-40 minutes or until all ingredients are tender.
5. Serve over steamed rice with mango chutney, coconut milk, and yogurt as desired.
